metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.16-beta.20
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Captures Space inside PsyReaSFX so it cannot also trigger REAPER transport. - Defers media-source destruction until the SWS Preview fade has completed. - Replaces workspace and Transfer media with current privacy-safe captures. - Adds logical-library and waveform-to-REAPER demos to the project homepage.
